issues.title: Text clipping detected
issues.expected: Visible text should fit its container without being clipped by overflow rules.
issues.actual: Text "Full screen (f)" overflows its container by 12px.

explanation.whatHappened: Visible text is clipped due to overflow constraints.
explanation.whyItMatters: Labels and messaging become unreadable.
recommendedFix: Allow wrapping or responsive truncation rules.
Increase control width for critical labels.

issues.title: Interactive controls overlap
issues.expected: Interactive controls should have non-overlapping hit targets.
issues.actual: Controls "a" and "Settings" overlap by 100% of the smaller target.

explanation.whatHappened: Interactive controls overlap in the same viewport region.
explanation.whyItMatters: Incorrect hits and accidental taps are likely.
recommendedFix: Increase spacing between controls.
Fix responsive layout breakpoints.

issues.title: Pagination controls lack result context
issues.expected: Pagination controls should include context such as page count or result totals.
issues.actual: Pagination controls are visible without nearby page/result count context.

explanation.whatHappened: Pagination controls appear without page/result context.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users cannot estimate position or progress.
recommendedFix: Display page count or result totals near pagination.
Keep current page indicator visible.

issues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions
issues.expected: Primary CTAs with the same label should map to the same destination or action.
issues.actual: Detected 2 visible primary-looking controls labeled "search" with different targets.
issues.testcaseTitle: Duplicate CTA labels with different actions

explanation.whatHappened: Primary-looking controls share label but map to different actions.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users infer incorrect outcomes from repeated labels.
recommendedFix: Disambiguate CTA labels.
Align label semantics to destination intent.

issues.title: Top-fold CTAs conflict in priority
issues.expected: Top-fold primary content should emphasize a single dominant CTA.
issues.actual: Detected 5 primary-looking top-fold CTAs with 5 different labels.

explanation.whatHappened: Top fold presents multiple competing primary CTAs.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users face decision friction and lower conversion confidence.
recommendedFix: Promote one dominant CTA per state.
Demote secondary actions visually.

issues.title: Primary visible control is obstructed
issues.expected: Visible buttons and links should receive pointer hits at their visual center.
issues.actual: The control "a" is covered by video.

explanation.whatHappened: A visible control does not receive pointer hit at center.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users perceive broken interactions and cannot progress.
recommendedFix: Fix stacking context or z-index collisions.
Align visual and clickable hit areas.

issues.title: Critical controls shift position after ready state
issues.expected: Primary CTAs and header navigation should remain positionally stable after UI readiness.
issues.actual: primary anchor shifted by 337px without user interaction.

explanation.whatHappened: Key anchors shifted after ready state without user action.
explanation.whyItMatters: Unexpected movement causes misclicks and loss of orientation.
recommendedFix: Reserve stable space for dynamic content.
Delay rendering until layout-critical data is ready.

issues.title: Possible localization/text formatting overflow
issues.expected: Localized date/currency/text strings should fit target containers at this breakpoint.
issues.actual: Localized or formatted text appears clipped by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Likely localized or formatted text appears clipped in the current viewport.
explanation.whyItMatters: Localization overflow can hide critical context such as prices, dates, or action labels.
recommendedFix: Use responsive container rules for localized strings.
Allow text wrapping or adaptive truncation for long locale variants.

explanation.whyItMatters: Incorrect hits and accidental taps are likely.
recommendedFix: Increase spacing between controls.
Fix responsive layout breakpoints.

issues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions
issues.expected: Primary CTAs with the same label should map to the same destination or action.
issues.actual: Detected 2 visible primary-looking controls labeled "search" with different targets.
issues.testcaseTitle: Duplicate CTA labels with different actions

explanation.whatHappened: Primary-looking controls share label but map to different actions.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users infer incorrect outcomes from repeated labels.
recommendedFix: Disambiguate CTA labels.
Align label semantics to destination intent.

issues.title: Primary visible control is obstructed
issues.expected: Visible buttons and links should receive pointer hits at their visual center.
issues.actual: The control "Previous video" is covered by button (Next video).

explanation.whatHappened: A visible control does not receive pointer hit at center.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users perceive broken interactions and cannot progress.
recommendedFix: Fix stacking context or z-index collisions.
Align visual and clickable hit areas.

issues.title: Text clipping detected
issues.expected: Visible text should fit its container without being clipped by overflow rules.
issues.actual: Text "Comments 265 Top Show featured comments Newest Show recent comments, including potential spam Description What if Cristi" overflows its container by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Visible text is clipped due to overflow constraints.
explanation.whyItMatters: Labels and messaging become unreadable.
recommendedFix: Allow wrapping or responsive truncation rules.
Increase control width for critical labels.

issues.title: Possible localization/text formatting overflow
issues.expected: Localized date/currency/text strings should fit target containers at this breakpoint.
issues.actual: Localized or formatted text appears clipped by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Likely localized or formatted text appears clipped in the current viewport.
explanation.whyItMatters: Localization overflow can hide critical context such as prices, dates, or action labels.
recommendedFix: Use responsive container rules for localized strings.
Allow text wrapping or adaptive truncation for long locale variants.

explanation.whatHappened: Interactive controls overlap in the same viewport region.

issues.title: Pagination controls lack result context

issues.actual: Pagination controls are visible without nearby page/result count context.

explanation.whatHappened: Pagination controls appear without page/result context.

Keep current page indicator visible.

issues.title: Possible localization/text formatting overflow
issues.expected: Localized date/currency/text strings should fit target containers at this breakpoint.
issues.actual: Localized or formatted text appears clipped by 480px.

issues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions

explanation.whyItMatters: Labels and messaging become unreadable.
recommendedFix: Allow wrapping or responsive truncation rules.
Increase control width for critical labels.

uiuxIssues.title: Possible localization/text formatting overflow
uiuxIssues.expected: Localized date/currency/text strings should fit target containers at this breakpoint.
uiuxIssues.actual: Localized or formatted text appears clipped by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Likely localized or formatted text appears clipped in the current viewport.
explanation.whyItMatters: Localization overflow can hide critical context such as prices, dates, or action labels.
recommendedFix: Use responsive container rules for localized strings.
Allow text wrapping or adaptive truncation for long locale variants.

uiuxIssues.title: Interactive controls overlap
uiuxIssues.expected: Interactive controls should have non-overlapping hit targets.
uiuxIssues.actual: Controls "a" and "Settings" overlap by 100% of the smaller target.

explanation.whatHappened: Interactive controls overlap in the same viewport region.
explanation.whyItMatters: Incorrect hits and accidental taps are likely.
recommendedFix: Increase spacing between controls.
Fix responsive layout breakpoints.

uiuxIssues.title: Pagination controls lack result context
uiuxIssues.expected: Pagination controls should include context such as page count or result totals.
uiuxIssues.actual: Pagination controls are visible without nearby page/result count context.

explanation.whatHappened: Pagination controls appear without page/result context.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users cannot estimate position or progress.
recommendedFix: Display page count or result totals near pagination.
Keep current page indicator visible.

uiuxIssues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions
uiuxIssues.expected: Primary CTAs with the same label should map to the same destination or action.
uiuxIssues.actual: Detected 2 visible primary-looking controls labeled "search" with different targets.
uiuxIssues.testcaseTitle: Duplicate CTA labels with different actions

explanation.whatHappened: Primary-looking controls share label but map to different actions.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users infer incorrect outcomes from repeated labels.
recommendedFix: Disambiguate CTA labels.
Align label semantics to destination intent.

uiuxIssues.title: Top-fold CTAs conflict in priority
uiuxIssues.expected: Top-fold primary content should emphasize a single dominant CTA.
uiuxIssues.actual: Detected 3 primary-looking top-fold CTAs with 3 different labels.

explanation.whatHappened: Top fold presents multiple competing primary CTAs.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users face decision friction and lower conversion confidence.
recommendedFix: Promote one dominant CTA per state.
Demote secondary actions visually.

uiuxIssues.actual: Detected 3 primary-looking top-fold CTAs with 3 different labels.

explanation.whatHappened: Top fold presents multiple competing primary CTAs.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users face decision friction and lower conversion confidence.
recommendedFix: Promote one dominant CTA per state.
Demote secondary actions visually.

uiuxIssues.title: Text clipping detected
uiuxIssues.expected: Visible text should fit its container without being clipped by overflow rules.
uiuxIssues.actual: Text "Comments 3.3K Top Show featured comments Newest Show recent comments, including potential spam Description World's Most " overflows its container by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Visible text is clipped due to overflow constraints.
explanation.whyItMatters: Labels and messaging become unreadable.
recommendedFix: Allow wrapping or responsive truncation rules.
Increase control width for critical labels.

uiuxIssues.title: Possible localization/text formatting overflow
uiuxIssues.expected: Localized date/currency/text strings should fit target containers at this breakpoint.
uiuxIssues.actual: Localized or formatted text appears clipped by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Likely localized or formatted text appears clipped in the current viewport.
explanation.whyItMatters: Localization overflow can hide critical context such as prices, dates, or action labels.
recommendedFix: Use responsive container rules for localized strings.
Allow text wrapping or adaptive truncation for long locale variants.

uiuxIssues.title: Interactive controls overlap
uiuxIssues.expected: Interactive controls should have non-overlapping hit targets.
uiuxIssues.actual: Controls "a" and "Settings" overlap by 100% of the smaller target.

explanation.whatHappened: Interactive controls overlap in the same viewport region.
explanation.whyItMatters: Incorrect hits and accidental taps are likely.
recommendedFix: Increase spacing between controls.
Fix responsive layout breakpoints.

uiuxIssues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions
uiuxIssues.expected: Primary CTAs with the same label should map to the same destination or action.
uiuxIssues.actual: Detected 2 visible primary-looking controls labeled "search" with different targets.
uiuxIssues.testcaseTitle: Duplicate CTA labels with different actions

explanation.whatHappened: Primary-looking controls share label but map to different actions.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users infer incorrect outcomes from repeated labels.
recommendedFix: Disambiguate CTA labels.
Align label semantics to destination intent.

uiuxIssues.title: Primary visible control is obstructed
uiuxIssues.expected: Visible buttons and links should receive pointer hits at their visual center.
uiuxIssues.actual: The control "Previous video" is covered by button (Next video).

explanation.whatHappened: A visible control does not receive pointer hit at center.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users perceive broken interactions and cannot progress.
recommendedFix: Fix stacking context or z-index collisions.
Align visual and clickable hit areas.

uiuxIssues.title: Pagination controls lack result context
uiuxIssues.expected: Pagination controls should include context such as page count or result totals.
uiuxIssues.actual: Pagination controls are visible without nearby page/result count context.

explanation.whatHappened: Pagination controls appear without page/result context.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users cannot estimate position or progress.
recommendedFix: Display page count or result totals near pagination.
Keep current page indicator visible.

uiuxIssues.title: Horizontal scrolling detected
uiuxIssues.expected: Pages should fit within the viewport width without requiring horizontal scroll.
uiuxIssues.actual: Page width exceeds viewport by 34px.

explanation.whatHappened: The page width exceeds the current viewport.
explanation.whyItMatters: Content can be clipped and touch interaction becomes unreliable.
recommendedFix: Constrain responsive containers.
Wrap or truncate long unbreakable content.

uiuxIssues.title: Navigation led to a broken page
uiuxIssues.expected: Navigation links should resolve to a valid destination page.
uiuxIssues.actual: Main document returned HTTP 200.

explanation.whatHappened: Navigation resolved to an error page or 4xx/5xx response.
explanation.whyItMatters: Broken links interrupt core user journeys.
recommendedFix: Fix route target and redirects.
Add route/link health checks to CI.

issues.actual: Localized or formatted text appears clipped by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Likely localized or formatted text appears clipped in the current viewport.
explanation.whyItMatters: Localization overflow can hide critical context such as prices, dates, or action labels.
recommendedFix: Use responsive container rules for localized strings.
Allow text wrapping or adaptive truncation for long locale variants.

issues.title: Interactive controls overlap
issues.expected: Interactive controls should have non-overlapping hit targets.
issues.actual: Controls "a" and "Settings" overlap by 100% of the smaller target.

explanation.whatHappened: Interactive controls overlap in the same viewport region.
explanation.whyItMatters: Incorrect hits and accidental taps are likely.
recommendedFix: Increase spacing between controls.
Fix responsive layout breakpoints.

issues.title: Text clipping detected
issues.expected: Visible text should fit its container without being clipped by overflow rules.
issues.actual: Text "Comments 636 Top Show featured comments Newest Show recent comments, including potential spam Description 3 Things In Ja" overflows its container by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Visible text is clipped due to overflow constraints.
explanation.whyItMatters: Labels and messaging become unreadable.
recommendedFix: Allow wrapping or responsive truncation rules.
Increase control width for critical labels.

issues.title: Interactive controls overlap
issues.expected: Interactive controls should have non-overlapping hit targets.
issues.actual: Controls "a" and "Settings" overlap by 100% of the smaller target.

issues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions
issues.expected: Primary CTAs with the same label should map to the same destination or action.
issues.actual: Detected 2 visible primary-looking controls labeled "search" with different targets.
issues.testcaseTitle: Duplicate CTA labels with different actions

explanation.whatHappened: Primary-looking controls share label but map to different actions.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users infer incorrect outcomes from repeated labels.
recommendedFix: Disambiguate CTA labels.
Align label semantics to destination intent.

issues.title: Primary visible control is obstructed
issues.expected: Visible buttons and links should receive pointer hits at their visual center.
issues.actual: The control "Previous video" is covered by button (Next video).

explanation.whatHappened: A visible control does not receive pointer hit at center.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users perceive broken interactions and cannot progress.
recommendedFix: Fix stacking context or z-index collisions.
Align visual and clickable hit areas.

issues.title: Pagination controls lack result context
issues.expected: Pagination controls should include context such as page count or result totals.
issues.actual: Pagination controls are visible without nearby page/result count context.

explanation.whatHappened: Pagination controls appear without page/result context.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users cannot estimate position or progress.
recommendedFix: Display page count or result totals near pagination.
Keep current page indicator visible.

issues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions
issues.expected: Primary CTAs with the same label should map to the same destination or action.
issues.actual: Detected 2 visible primary-looking controls labeled "search" with different targets.
issues.testcaseTitle: Duplicate CTA labels with different actions

explanation.whatHappened: Primary-looking controls share label but map to different actions.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users infer incorrect outcomes from repeated labels.
recommendedFix: Disambiguate CTA labels.
Align label semantics to destination intent.

issues.title: Top-fold CTAs conflict in priority
issues.expected: Top-fold primary content should emphasize a single dominant CTA.
issues.actual: Detected 3 primary-looking top-fold CTAs with 3 different labels.

explanation.whatHappened: Top fold presents multiple competing primary CTAs.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users face decision friction and lower conversion confidence.
recommendedFix: Promote one dominant CTA per state.
Demote secondary actions visually.

explanation.whyItMatters: Incorrect hits and accidental taps are likely.
recommendedFix: Increase spacing between controls.
Fix responsive layout breakpoints.

issues.title: Pagination controls lack result context
issues.expected: Pagination controls should include context such as page count or result totals.
issues.actual: Pagination controls are visible without nearby page/result count context.

explanation.whatHappened: Pagination controls appear without page/result context.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users cannot estimate position or progress.
recommendedFix: Display page count or result totals near pagination.
Keep current page indicator visible.

issues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions
issues.expected: Primary CTAs with the same label should map to the same destination or action.
issues.actual: Detected 2 visible primary-looking controls labeled "search" with different targets.
issues.testcaseTitle: Duplicate CTA labels with different actions

explanation.whatHappened: Primary-looking controls share label but map to different actions.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users infer incorrect outcomes from repeated labels.
recommendedFix: Disambiguate CTA labels.
Align label semantics to destination intent.

issues.title: Top-fold CTAs conflict in priority
issues.expected: Top-fold primary content should emphasize a single dominant CTA.
issues.actual: Detected 3 primary-looking top-fold CTAs with 3 different labels.

explanation.whatHappened: Top fold presents multiple competing primary CTAs.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users face decision friction and lower conversion confidence.
recommendedFix: Promote one dominant CTA per state.
Demote secondary actions visually.

issues.title: Text clipping detected
issues.expected: Visible text should fit its container without being clipped by overflow rules.
issues.actual: Text "Comments 2.7K Top Show featured comments Newest Show recent comments, including potential spam Description Ranking Ronal" overflows its container by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Visible text is clipped due to overflow constraints.
explanation.whyItMatters: Labels and messaging become unreadable.
recommendedFix: Allow wrapping or responsive truncation rules.
Increase control width for critical labels.

issues.title: Possible localization/text formatting overflow
issues.expected: Localized date/currency/text strings should fit target containers at this breakpoint.
issues.actual: Localized or formatted text appears clipped by 480px.

explanation.whatHappened: Likely localized or formatted text appears clipped in the current viewport.
explanation.whyItMatters: Localization overflow can hide critical context such as prices, dates, or action labels.
recommendedFix: Use responsive container rules for localized strings.
Allow text wrapping or adaptive truncation for long locale variants.

explanation.whatHappened: Top fold presents multiple competing primary CTAs.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users face decision friction and lower conversion confidence.
recommendedFix: Promote one dominant CTA per state.
Demote secondary actions visually.

issues.title: Navigation led to a broken page
issues.expected: Navigation links should resolve to a valid destination page.
issues.actual: Main document returned HTTP 200.

explanation.whatHappened: Navigation resolved to an error page or 4xx/5xx response.
explanation.whyItMatters: Broken links interrupt core user journeys.
recommendedFix: Fix route target and redirects.
Add route/link health checks to CI.

issues.title: Primary visible control is obstructed
issues.expected: Visible buttons and links should receive pointer hits at their visual center.
issues.actual: The control "a" is covered by video.

explanation.whatHappened: A visible control does not receive pointer hit at center.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users perceive broken interactions and cannot progress.
recommendedFix: Fix stacking context or z-index collisions.
Align visual and clickable hit areas.

issues.title: Text clipping detected
issues.expected: Visible text should fit its container without being clipped by overflow rules.
issues.actual: Text "Full screen (f)" overflows its container by 12px.

explanation.whatHappened: Visible text is clipped due to overflow constraints.
explanation.whyItMatters: Labels and messaging become unreadable.
recommendedFix: Allow wrapping or responsive truncation rules.
Increase control width for critical labels.

issues.title: Interactive controls overlap
issues.expected: Interactive controls should have non-overlapping hit targets.
issues.actual: Controls "a" and "Settings" overlap by 100% of the smaller target.

explanation.whatHappened: Interactive controls overlap in the same viewport region.
explanation.whyItMatters: Incorrect hits and accidental taps are likely.
recommendedFix: Increase spacing between controls.
Fix responsive layout breakpoints.

issues.title: Duplicate primary CTA labels point to different actions
issues.expected: Primary CTAs with the same label should map to the same destination or action.
issues.actual: Detected 2 visible primary-looking controls labeled "search" with different targets.
issues.testcaseTitle: Duplicate CTA labels with different actions

explanation.whatHappened: Primary-looking controls share label but map to different actions.
explanation.whyItMatters: Users infer incorrect outcomes from repeated labels.
recommendedFix: Disambiguate CTA labels.
Align label semantics to destination intent.
